description_long: This handbag features a rounded, cylindrical form with a domed lid and a small, circular knob at the top center. The exterior is designed to mimic a tightly woven basket, with a detailed herringbone pattern in natural beige and tan tones, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. The surface texture appears slightly raised, simulating the tactile feel of woven straw or rattan. There are no visible handles, straps, or external pockets, and the lid seems to fit snugly over the main body. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, hollow interior suitable for carrying personal items. The design is simple and functional, with an emphasis on the woven pattern as the primary visual feature.
description: A rounded, basket-style handbag with a domed lid and a woven herringbone pattern in natural beige tones. The design is simple, rustic, and lacks visible straps or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the domed lid with a central knob and the woven herringbone pattern clearly; no handles or straps are visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the curvature of the body and the seamless continuation of the woven pattern around the sides.
description_view_2: The side view reveals a slight variation in the weave pattern, with a subtle indentation, but maintains the same overall texture and form.
description_view_3: Back view mirrors the front, with the woven pattern and domed lid, and no additional features or openings.
attribute_strap_type: none visible; no handles or straps are present on the exterior.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Lid with central knob; the lid appears to rest on top and can be lifted off.
